summary: Results-driven Junior Software Developer proficient in OOP, passionate about tackling complex problems and delivering creative solutions. Drove the design and implementation of new game features in a Unity3D environment, rapidly mastering an under-documented C# codebase by applying object-oriented design and Agile/Kanban principles to refactor systems. Independently engineered a message router in Java/Spring Boot and Apache Camel, proactively building a modular, adaptable architecture to address future use cases and fault lines, secured with an embedded SQL database and comprehensive JUnit test coverage. Eager to contribute to a dynamic development team, tackle real-world engineering challenges, and grow alongside industry veterans.
